name: Brain MRI Tumor Protocol
description: Comprehensive brain MRI protocol for tumor evaluation with pre and post-contrast sequences

findings.technique: MRI brain with tumor protocol including pre-contrast T1, T2, FLAIR, DWI, post-contrast T1, and SWI.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Pre-Contrast Sequences
sections.content: No mass or lesion identified. Normal brain parenchymal signal. No abnormal T2/FLAIR hyperintensity.

sections.name: Post-Contrast Sequences
sections.content: No abnormal enhancement. No ring-enhancing or nodular lesions. No abnormal meningeal enhancement.

sections.name: Diffusion
sections.content: No restricted diffusion to suggest high-grade tumor. Normal diffusion pattern.

sections.name: Susceptibility
sections.content: No susceptibility artifact to suggest hemorrhage or calcification within tumor.

impression:
1. No mass or tumor identified.
2. Normal post-contrast study.
3. No abnormal enhancement to suggest intracranial neoplasm.
author: RadReport Templates
